ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* To indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., activity, appointment, habit) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* To indicate if the event is recurring */,
  "recurrence_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* To indicate if the event is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was last updated */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location type */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* To indicate if the location is a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_locations" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the event */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the event */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the event */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the event */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation during the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the weather data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the weather data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., event, weather) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* To indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather forecast */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the event */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the event */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in the forecast */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction in the forecast */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "is_sent" INTEGER /* To indicate if the reminder has been sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reminder was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "location_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_history" (
  "event_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
